summary: ARCH-PREFLIGHT-001 is resolved. The Architecture now binds the fetched origin/main baseline and reviewed implementation HEAD to the fresh 85/65/9/11 conformance evidence. Current repair HEAD preserves the same aggregate conformance result, introduces no new run-session-to-CLI reverse edge, and retains 124/124 current-HEAD targeted test evidence.

resolved_findings.resolution: The Architecture conformance paragraph now cites origin/main 6222d118315e7001abcbdc786aca932e48c58232 and reviewed implementation HEAD ce89e4589ba8c96a418249cd2f9aa673acea646b with identical 85 total, 65 undeclared, 9 budget, and 11 orphan findings.

architecture_evidence_freshness.judgment: The obsolete db8f... and 86-finding paragraph was replaced with the requested base and reviewed-HEAD identities and the fresh 85/65/9/11 breakdown.

current_head_conformance.judgment: The current repair-HEAD artifact and fetched-base artifact both report 85 total findings: 65 undeclared dependencies, 9 budget violations, and 11 orphan files. Their serialized finding sets differ only in the existing execution-state.js line-count budget observation, from 1915 base lines to 1919 current lines; no finding category or aggregate count is added.

no_new_run_session_to_cli_reverse_edge.judgment: Both current and base artifacts report the same run-session-to-CLI undeclared dependency with 9 edges and the same guarded-run-session.js examples. The implementation diff adds no CLI, guarded-run-session, connector, or independent-review-orchestrator import to execution-state.js.

selected_story_route_owner_boundary.judgment: The source change remains confined to execution-state reconciliation. It resolves the selected Story's PR route through artifact-routing and derives story scope from the canonical template without fabricating a probe Story or duplicating CLI, run-session, connector, merge, or independent-review ownership.

bounded_repair_review_budget.judgment: The repair commit adds exactly two aggregate review slots, one architecture_boundary slot and one spec_consistency slot, with an explicit repair-review reason. It does not widen global defaults or unrelated role limits and permits no waiver.

current_targeted_evidence.judgment: The targeted status artifact is explicitly bound to 42a6b66a627c7d3846cc1a33a390d2d09e926bf7 and its TAP artifact reports 124 tests passed, 0 failed, including OCR-S-9 selected-Story schema 0.2 PR-route authority and the no-probe-Story regression.

boundary_note: This pass closes the architecture repair re-review for ARCH-PREFLIGHT-001. It is not by itself overall PR Gate, merge, delivery, or runtime authorization.
